creator: sada@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
Now, www/netscape4-{communicator,navigator} ports are
	using `ns-install' script to install the browsers.
	However, this script erases extracted distribution files
	when it is run, then if you once make install, you would
	lost work/* files and couldn't make reinstall.
	Instead, instalation by the ports' Makefile would be better.

Fix: # ``scripts'' and ``patches'' subdirectories should be removed.
